mapper.select: select max(entrustment_no) from test_entrusted_info

select id, entrustment_no, entrust_type, entrust_company, entrust_company_id, entrust_people, entrust_phone, witness_uint, witness_person, witness_phone, project_name, project_part, sampling_method, check_purpose, report_count, report_type, request_date, payment_method, present_information, acceptance_date, team, state, remark, invalid_reason, operate_user, operate_date, file_url, is_save, business_acceptor, seal_type, count_price AS paymentCount, address, addressee, mobile, mailbox, file_url_str, entrust_test_type, design_strength, intensity_of_configuration, antifreeze_level, water_binder_ratio, unit_water_use, sand_ratio, design_slump, mixing_way, task_source, discount, system_price, actual_price from test_entrusted_info where id = #{id}
SELECT id, entrustment_no FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE entrustment_no = #{code}

SELECT id, entrustment_no, entrust_company, entrust_people, project_name, business_acceptor, acceptance_date, state FROM test_entrusted_info
and entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
and entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and business_acceptor LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessAcceptor},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and state = #{state}
ORDER BY entrustment_no DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.entrustment_no, t1.entrust_company, t1.entrust_people, t1.project_name, t1.business_acceptor, t1.acceptance_date, t1.state, IFNULL( t2.task_code, "——" ) taskCode, IFNULL(t3.name,"——") teamName FROM test_entrusted_info t1 left join test_task t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id left join test_team t3 on t2.dept_id = t3.id
and t1.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t1.entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.business_acceptor LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessAcceptor},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.state = #{state}
and t2.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCodeParam},'%')
ORDER BY entrustment_no DESC

SELECT id, entrustment_no, entrust_company, entrust_people, project_name, business_acceptor, acceptance_date, state FROM test_entrusted_info
and entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
and entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and business_acceptor LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessAcceptor},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and state!=0 and state!=144 and state!=200
ORDER BY entrustment_no DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.entrustment_no, t1.entrust_company, t1.entrust_people, t1. project_name, t1.business_acceptor, t1.acceptance_date, t1.state, IFNULL( t2.task_code, "——" ) taskCode, IFNULL(t3.name,"——") teamName FROM test_entrusted_info t1 left join test_task t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id left join test_team t3 on t2.dept_id = t3.id
and t1.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t1.entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.business_acceptor LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessAcceptor},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.state!=0 and t1.state!=144 and t1.state!=200
and t2.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCodeParam},'%')
ORDER BY t1.entrustment_no DESC

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id AS id, t1.entrustment_no AS entrustment_no, t1.entrust_company AS entrust_company, t1.entrust_people AS entrust_people, t1.business_acceptor AS business_acceptor, t1.acceptance_date AS acceptance_date, CONCAT(t3.sample_name,"(",")") AS sampleStatus FROM test_entrusted_info as t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel as t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample as t3 ON t3.id = t2.sample_id
and t1.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t1.entrust_company LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustCompany},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.business_acceptor LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessAcceptor},'%')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endingDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.state = #{state}
GROUP BY t1.entrustment_no ORDER BY t1.entrustment_no DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT into test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel(sample_id, entrust_id, check_item_id, standard_id, method_id, times, unit_price, check_item_name ) VALUES
(#{item.sampleId},#{item.entrustId},#{item.checkItemId},#{item.standardId},#{item.methodId},#{item.times},#{item.unitPrice}, #{item.checkItemName})

delete.foreach: delete from test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel where entrust_id = #{item.entrustId} and check_item_id = #{item.checkItemId}

mapper.insert: insert into test_entrusted_payment_record_info(entrustment_id, price, time, operator) values (#{entrustmentId}, #{price}, #{time}, #{operator})

insert into test_entrusted_info(id, entrustment_no, entrust_type, entrust_company, entrust_people, entrust_phone, witness_uint, witness_person, witness_phone, project_name, project_part, sampling_method, check_purpose, report_count, report_type, request_date, payment_method, present_information, business_acceptor, acceptance_date, team, remark, invalid_reason, operate_user, operate_date, file_url, seal_type, is_save, count_price, address, addressee, mobile, mailbox, file_url_str, state, entrust_test_type, design_strength, intensity_of_configuration, antifreeze_level, water_binder_ratio, unit_water_use, sand_ratio, design_slump, mixing_way, entrust_company_id, task_source, discount, actual_price, system_price, department) values (#{id}, #{entrustmentNo}, #{entrustType}, #{entrustCompany}, #{entrustPeople}, #{entrustPhone}, #{witnessUint}, #{witnessPerson}, #{witnessPhone}, #{projectName}, #{projectPart}, #{samplingMethod}, #{checkPurpose}, #{reportCount}, #{reportType}, #{requestDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{presentInformation}, #{businessAcceptor}, #{acceptanceDate}, #{team}, #{remark}, #{invalidReason}, #{operateUser}, #{operateDate}, #{fileUrl}, #{sealType}, #{isSave}, #{countPrice}, #{address}, #{addressee}, #{mobile}, #{mailbox}, #{fileUrlStr}, #{state}, #{entrustTestType}, #{designStrength}, #{intensityOfConfiguration}, #{antifreezeLevel}, #{waterBinderRatio}, #{unitWaterUse}, #{sandRatio}, #{designSlump}, #{mixingWay}, #{entrustCompanyId}, #{taskSource}, #{discount}, #{actualPrice}, #{systemPrice}, #{department})
mapper.update:
UPDATE test_entrusted_info
entrust_type=#{entrustType}, business_acceptor=#{businessAcceptor}, entrust_company=#{entrustCompany}, entrust_company_id=#{entrustCompanyId}, entrust_people=#{entrustPeople}, entrust_phone=#{entrustPhone}, witness_uint=#{witnessUint}, witness_person=#{witnessPerson}, witness_phone=#{witnessPhone}, project_name=#{projectName}, sampling_method=#{samplingMethod}, project_part=#{projectPart}, check_purpose=#{checkPurpose}, sampling_method=#{samplingMethod}, report_count=#{reportCount}, report_type=#{reportType}, request_date=#{requestDate}, payment_method=#{paymentMethod}, count_price=#{paymentCount},
present_information=#{presentInformation},
acceptance_date=#{acceptanceDate}, team=#{team}, state=#{state}, remark=#{remark}, file_url=#{fileUrl}, seal_type=#{sealType}, is_save=#{isSave}, count_price=#{countPrice}, address=#{address}, addressee=#{addressee}, mobile=#{mobile}, mailbox=#{mailbox}, operate_user=#{operateUser}, operate_date=#{operateDate}, invalid_reason=#{invalidReason}, file_url_str=#{fileUrlStr}, entrust_test_type=#{entrustTestType}, design_strength=#{designStrength},
intensity_of_configuration=#{intensityOfConfiguration},
antifreeze_level=#{antifreezeLevel}, water_binder_ratio=#{waterBinderRatio}, unit_water_use=#{unitWaterUse}, sand_ratio=#{sandRatio}, design_slump=#{designSlump}, mixing_way=#{mixingWay}, task_source=#{taskSource}, discount=#{discount}, actual_price=#{actualPrice}, system_price=#{systemPrice}, department=#{department},
and id = #{id}
and entrustment_no = #{entrustmentNo}
mapper.select: SELECT t2.name FROM test_entrusted_info as t1 LEFT JOIN test_init_data as t2 ON t1.payment_method = t2.id WHERE t1.id = #{entrustmentId}
SELECT t2.address FROM test_entrusted_info as t1 LEFT JOIN test_company as t2 ON t1.entrust_company = t2.company_name WHERE t1.id = #{entrustmentId}
SELECT s.code FROM test_standard_file s LEFT JOIN test_product_standard_file_rel sf ON s.id = sf.standard_file_id WHERE sf.product_id = #{productId} AND s.type IN (2, 3)
SELECT project_name as projectName, project_part as projectPart FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE entrust_company = #{name} ORDER BY entrustment_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t1.contacts as contacts, t1.phone as contactWay FROM test_customer as t1 LEFT JOIN test_company as t2 ON t1.company_id = t2.company_id WHERE t2.company_name = #{name} and type = #{type} and t1.contacts is not NULL

SELECT t2.company_id as companyId, t1.contacts as contacts, t1.phone as contactWay FROM test_customer as t1 LEFT JOIN test_company as t2 ON t1.company_id = t2.company_id WHERE t2.company_name = #{name} and type = #{type} LIMIT 1
SELECT t2.id VALUE, t2.NAME label FROM test_check_item_team_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.team_id = t2.id WHERE t1.check_item_id = #{checkItemId} ORDER BY t2.sort ASC

WITH RECURSIVE td AS ( SELECT check_item_id, check_price as unitPrice, check_item_name, check_item_pid, coordinate FROM test_product_item WHERE check_item_id = #{checkItemId} UNION ALL SELECT c.check_item_id, c.check_price as unitPrice, c.check_item_name, c.check_item_pid, c.coordinate FROM test_product_item c, td WHERE c.check_item_pid = td.check_item_id ) SELECT * FROM td
select task_code from test_task where entrustment_id = #{id}
SELECT t2.id value, t2.NAME label FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId} ORDER BY t2.sort ASC
SELECT sample_id FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel where entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId}
SELECT state FROM test_entrusted_info where id = #{entrustmentId}

SELECT id, sample_id, entrust_id, check_item_name, check_item_id, standard_id, times FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel where sample_id = #{sampleId} and entrust_id = #{entrustId} order by LENGTH(check_item_name)
SELECT state FROM test_report_record where entrustment_id= #{entrustmentId}
SELECT count(*) FROM test_task where entrustment_id= #{entrustmentId}
SELECT id FROM test_report_record where entrustment_id= #{entrustmentId}

SELECT count(*) FROM test_entrusted_info
and state = 0
and department in
#{id}
